title: Samayasara: The Soul's Essence
description: Kundakunda's analysis of the soul's true nature: pure, infinite, conscious, and completely distinct from matter.
introduction: Kundakunda's analysis of the soul's true nature: pure, infinite, conscious, and completely distinct from matter.

translation.original_text: ātmā khalu eso sahu ṇāṇamao damsaṇamao
translation.text: The soul, verily, is knowledge itself, vision itself.
